method_summary: RoPeSLR is a 3D RoPE-guided Sparse-LowRank attention framework that addresses the RoPE Dilemma by using a head-wise low-rank parameterization with learnable 3D Absolute Positional Embedding injection to preserve the orthogonal relative-position structure of 3D Rotary Position Embeddings.
key_innovation: The decoupling of the DiT attention manifold into a high-frequency semantic spike set (O(L^(3/2)) sparsity) and an extreme low-rank (O(d_h log L)) background continuum while preserving 3D RoPE structure.

key_results.FLOPs_reduction: 10× fewer FLOPs at 90% sparsity on Wan2.1-1.3B

best_result: 10× fewer FLOPs at 90% sparsity on Wan2.1-1.3B
title: RoPeSLR: 3D RoPE-driven Sparse-LowRank Attention for Efficient Diffusion Transformers
